# 2023 Consumer Payments Survey Report

![pettern](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20684%20460'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Understanding consumer behavior is a crucial factor for merchants to succeed. This report discusses insights and trends from a consumer survey exploring current expectations towards online payments. Use the information to understand market expectations in 2023 and to develop a business strategy according to forecasted consumer preferences.

Get the Merchant Fraud Journal report, sponsored by Sift, to learn:

*   How the way consumers pay online and offline has changed in the last 2-3 years
*   The implications of consumer preferences for businesses
*   How organizations can adjust their fraud prevention posture in light of consumer insights

### Download the Report
